raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 2698 will increase access to early childhood mental health consultation services for children enrolled in the California State Preschool Program.",
    "The law bars state-subsidized preschool programs from expelling children until they first take actions to support the child and family.",
    "Assembly Bill 1871 requires charter schools to provide students in need with one nutritional free or reduced-price meal each school day.",
    "Senate Bill 1045 allows specific counties to place chronically homeless individuals into conservatorship if they are incapable of caring for their own health due to serious mental illness and substance use disorder.",
    "Senate Bill 823 mandates that the Department of Health Care Services adopt evidence-based standards of care for licensed recovery or treatment facilities addressing adult alcoholism or drug abuse.",
    "Senate Bill 822 prohibits internet service providers from blocking or slowing specific types of content or applications.",
    "Senate Bill 822 prevents internet service providers from charging companies for faster access to customers.",
    "Assembly Bill 2941 allows health plans to authorize care by out-of-network providers for individuals displaced by emergencies.",
    "Assembly Bill 2188 aims to improve disclosure in online political ads, making true funders of campaigns more transparent to voters."
  ]
}
```
